headline: Leerink Sees Limited Near-Term Upside for Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (ZBH) Ahead of 2027 Catalysts
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Best Healthcare Stocks to Buy and Hold for 3 Years. Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. is one of the best healthcare stocks on this list. summary: Mobileye develops advanced driver assistance and autonomous driving technologies for global automotive manufacturers and suppliers.
